nodes.label: Agentic AI Proliferation
nodes.description: Mass adoption of autonomous AI agents in enterprise workflows, replacing routine human tasks in coding, customer support, and data processing.

nodes.label: Fresher Hiring Collapse
nodes.description: Structural 80-86% decline in entry-level IT hiring; companies no longer need 'bench' strength for routine execution.

nodes.label: Salary Package Depletion
nodes.description: Stagnation of entry-level compensation as AI-augmented productivity reduces the 'human-per-dollar' value.

nodes.label: GCC Top-Heavy Pivot
nodes.description: Global Capability Centres cannibalize top-tier talent for AI/ML, abandoning the mass-market engineering graduate pool.

nodes.label: Youth Productivity Loss
nodes.description: Massive underemployment of the graduate cohort leads to long-term skill atrophy and potential social unrest in Tier-2/3 tech hubs.

nodes.label: Structural Skill Mismatch
nodes.description: Widening gap between academic output and the high-judgment, AI-integrated roles required by the 2026 market.

headline: THE GREAT DECOUPLING: AI AGENTS HAVE PERMANENTLY DISMANTLED THE INDIAN IT LABOR PYRAMID
